metrics.name: Total GPV
metrics.description: Gross Payment Variance — total invoiced savings for original edits

metrics.name: Total NPV
metrics.description: Net Payment Variance — net savings after adjustments

metrics.name: NPV Rate (NPV%)
metrics.description: Net savings as percent of paid (non-bypassed). This is the standard NPV% formula for HCT.

metrics.name: APV Rate (APV%)
metrics.description: Adjustment rate — adjustments as percent of GPV

metrics.name: Edit Rate (Edits per 1000 Lines)
metrics.description: Number of edited lines per 1000 non-bypassed lines

metrics.name: Claims per 1000 Members
metrics.description: Utilization metric: distinct claims per 1000 distinct members. REQUIRES TWO SEPARATE CTEs. CTE1 (claims): level_of_detail = full visual granularity LOD. CTE2 (members): level_of_detail = mapped member LOD derived FROM THE CLAIMS LOD (not output columns). MAPPING: if claims LOD contains betos/icd/cpt/pos/spec → member LOD MUST be 'period_lob_state'. If claims LOD contains product only → strip product (e.g. period_lob_prod → period_lob). Otherwise map directly. NEVER use 'period' as member LOD when claims LOD has clinical dimensions. Use default_indicator_cm='1' for members.
metrics.member_lod_rule: Derive from claims LOD: betos/icd/cpt/pos/spec → period_lob_state; product-only → strip product; else direct map. NEVER use 'period' for clinical LODs.

metrics.name: Total Received Spend
metrics.description: Total incoming volume in dollars (bypassed + non-bypassed)

metrics.name: Percent Share of Paid
metrics.description: Share of a subset's paid relative to total paid. Use CASE WHEN for numerator and denominator.
metrics.formula: SUM(CASE WHEN <filter> THEN "paid" ELSE 0 END) / NULLIF(SUM("paid"), 0)

metrics.name: Bypass Rate
metrics.description: Percent of lines that are bypassed

metrics.name: Claim Count
metrics.description: Distinct claim count at specified level_of_detail

metrics.name: Member Count
metrics.description: Distinct member count. Only available at 4 levels: period, period_lob, period_state, period_lob_state. Never available at deeper LODs containing product, betos, cpt, icd, pos, or spec.
